name: smart_zone.live_probe_safe_clean
description: Smart Zone Manager v1 clean-save live probe. Evidence-class firewall: this scenario is live/UI proof only if the screenshots show the named checkpoint facts for before-action gameplay, Zone Manager/type picker, Smart Zone generation prompt/result, and reopened generated layout. If it merely loads the game and exits, classify it as load proof only / inconclusive for layout. Deterministic clzones geometry/overlap tests are the required first proof class.

steps.label: fresh_play_now_settle_and_safe_mode_guard
steps.abort_reason: safe-mode/hostile trigger visible before Smart Zone setup; no Zone Manager keys driven
steps.expected_visible_fact: before action: gameplay loaded on a safe normal screen, with no Stop moving/Spotted/Safe mode interruption visible

steps.label: disable_safe_mode_before_zone_setup
steps.abort_reason: safe-mode/hostile trigger visible after safe-mode toggle; no Zone Manager keys driven
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe-mode toggle completed and gameplay is still on a normal safe screen before setup

steps.label: spawn_brazier_item
steps.expected_visible_fact: brazier spawn step completed; later checkpoints must prove the item was actually available/placed

steps.label: open_wield_inventory
steps.expected_visible_fact: wield inventory menu is open, not throw/debug/zone UI

steps.label: filter_wield_inventory
steps.expected_visible_fact: wield inventory filter prompt is active

steps.label: type_brazier_filter
steps.expected_visible_fact: wield inventory is filtered to brazier-related item(s)

steps.label: select_filtered_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: brazier is selected/wielded or the screen clearly indicates the selected wield result

steps.label: apply_wielded_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: apply/place flow for the brazier is open, not a different inventory menu

steps.label: place_brazier_east
steps.expected_visible_fact: brazier placement resolves on the map; if this is not visible, layout proof cannot rely on it

steps.label: pass_turn_after_brazier
steps.abort_reason: safe-mode/hostile trigger visible before Zone Manager setup; no Zone Manager keys driven
steps.expected_visible_fact: gameplay returns after placement with no hostile/safe-mode interruption

steps.label: open_zones_manager
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager UI is visibly open

steps.label: add_zone
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager add-zone/type picker flow is visibly open

steps.label: filter_zone_type_picker
steps.expected_visible_fact: zone type picker filter prompt is active

steps.label: type_storage_zone_filter
steps.expected_visible_fact: zone type picker is filtered to Basecamp: Storage

steps.label: select_filtered_storage_zone_type
steps.expected_visible_fact: Basecamp: Storage type is selected, not another Loot/Mutagens/etc. type

steps.label: accept_default_storage_zone_name
steps.expected_visible_fact: Basecamp: Storage naming/area selection flow is accepted

steps.label: pick_zone_start
steps.expected_visible_fact: zone area selection cursor/start point is visible on the intended map area

steps.label: move_to_zone_end
steps.expected_visible_fact: zone rectangle end point spans the intended storage/basecamp area

steps.label: confirm_zone_end
steps.expected_visible_fact: zone area confirmation completed and Smart Zone Manager generation prompt/result is expected next

steps.label: accept_smart_zone_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: Smart Zone Manager prompt/result is accepted; this is the generation checkpoint

steps.label: post_smart_zone_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-generation screen is stable after Smart Zone stamping

steps.label: exit_zones_manager
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager exits from generated-zone state rather than a wrong menu

steps.label: confirm_save_changes
steps.expected_visible_fact: zone changes save confirmation is accepted

steps.label: post_save_gameplay_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: gameplay is stable after saving zone changes

steps.label: reopen_zones_manager_for_layout_capture
steps.expected_visible_fact: reopened Zone Manager/map overlay shows the actual generated Smart Zone positions and separations

evidence_contract.deterministic_first: tests/clzones_test.cpp must assert generated-zone geometry and overlap allowlist before any live/UI closure claim.
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for layout
live_required_checkpoints: before action: normal gameplay screen, no hostile/safe-mode interruption
relevant UI/menu open: Zone Manager and Basecamp: Storage type selection are visibly on the intended screens
generation triggered: Smart Zone Manager prompt/result is visible after selecting the Basecamp: Storage area
layout inspected: reopened Zone Manager or map overlay visibly shows generated zone positions, not just serialized artifacts
evidence_contract.failure_rule: If any checkpoint lands on the wrong screen, wrong menu item, missing placed fixture, or only startup/load screen, the live verdict is inconclusive for Smart Zone layout.
